name: lom-idle-v2
description: Clean Legend of Mir idle-game prototype, starting with one-direction Crystal animation playback.

scripts.release:itch: npm run audit:release && npm run package:itch && npm run verify:itch && npm run audit:itch
scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node tools/check-game-modules.mjs && node --check src/atlas.js && node --check src/groupDungeonSwarm.js && node --check src/playerActions.js && node --check src/spellBodyActions.js && node --check src/battleData.js && node --check src/phase1Data.js && node --check src/warriorMagic.js && node --check tools/build-phase1-items.mjs && node --check tools/merge-item-drops.mjs && node --check tools/build-sfx-assets.mjs && node --check tools/itch-spellfx-manifest.mjs && node --check tools/verify-itch-release.mjs && node --check tools/package-itch.mjs && node --check tools/audit-itch-package.mjs && node --check tools/server.mjs && node --check tools/stats-worker/worker.js && npm run verify:itch:source
